# Skill: Manual Test Checklist

## Goal
Generate manual test checklist for features.

## Input
- Feature name

## Instructions

1. Generate checklist:
   - Create
   - Read
   - Update
   - Delete
   - Persistence (restart app)

2. Include:
   - Edge cases
   - Error scenarios

## Output Example

- Create item
- Edit item
- Delete item
- Restart app and verify persistence
- Invalid input handling
